task_relevant.Description: Whether the dot was task-relevant for block

Levels.event: Dots that automatically deflected at the deflection point
Levels.target: Task-relevant dots that went past the deflection point (response required)
Levels.distractor: Task-irrelevant dots that went past the deflection point

direction_of_approach.Description: Side of the screen that the dot onset on

critical_time.Description: How long after onset until a dot reached the deflection point (s)
